top.name: Magnum Opus
top.rules_text: Choose a card in your hand. It becomes Perfected for the rest of the fight: both halves cost 0 and gain +3 to all damage/healing values. Perfected cards are not discarded after use.

bottom.name: Arcane Singularity
bottom.rules_text: Create Singularity Crystal on tile (20HP). All spells by any player within range 3 also resolve on the Singularity's tile. You gain 1 charge per spell that hits it.

channel.name: Arcane Singularity (Channel)
channel.rules_text: Channel: Range is 5 and gain 2 charges per hit
